class="vector-body" aria-labelledby="firstHeading" data-mw-ve-target-container>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="vector-body-before-content">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="mw-indicators">\n\t\t</div>\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div id="siteSub" class="noprint">From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div id="contentSub"><div id="mw-content-subtitle"></div></div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t\t<div id="mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"><div class="mw-subjectpageheader">\n</div><div class="mw-content-ltr mw-parser-output" lang="en" dir="ltr"><p>\nBelow is a list of companies having stocks that are included in the <b>S&amp;P MidCap 400</b> (<b><a href="/wiki/S%26P_400" title="S&amp;P 400">S&amp;P 400</a></b>) <a href="/wiki/Stock_market_index" title="Stock market index">stock market index</a>. The index, maintained by <a href="/wiki/S%26P_Dow_Jones_Indices" title="S&amp;P Dow Jones Indices">S&amp;P Dow Jones Indices</a>, comprises the common stocks of 400 <a href="/wiki/Market_capitalization" title="Market capitalization">mid-cap</a>, mostly American, companies. Although called the S&amp;P 400, the index sometimes contains more than 400 stocks when it includes two or more share classes of stock from one of its component companies.\n</p>\n<meta property="mw:PageProp/toc" />\n<div class="mw-heading mw-heading2"><h2 id="S&amp;P_MidCap_400_component_stocks"><span id="S.26P_MidCap_400_component_stocks"></span>S&amp;P MidCap 400 component stocks</h2><span class="mw-editsection"><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">[</span><a href="/w/index.php?title=List_of_S%26P_400_companies&amp;action=edit&amp;section=1" title="Edit section: S&amp;P MidCap 400 component stocks"><span>edit</span></a><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">]</span></span></div>\n<style data-mw-deduplicate="TemplateStyles:r1305414688">@media screen and components"><span>edit</span></a><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">]</span></span></div>\n<p>S&amp;P Dow Jones Indices updates the components of the S&amp;P 400 periodically, typically in response to acquisitions, or to keep the index up to date as various companies grow or shrink in value.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-1" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-1"><span class="vector-body" aria-labelledby="firstHeading" data-mw-ve-target-container>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div class="vector-body-before-content">\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t<div class="mw-indicators">\n\t\t</div>\n\n\t\t\t\t\t\t<div id="siteSub" class="noprint">From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t</div>\n\t\t\t\t\t<div id="contentSub"><div id="mw-content-subtitle"></div></div>\n\t\t\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t\t\n\t\t\t\t\t<div id="mw-content-text" class="mw-body-content"><div class="mw-subjectpageheader">\n</div><div class="mw-content-ltr mw-parser-output" lang="en" dir="ltr"><p class="mw-empty-elt">\n</p><p>The <a href="/wiki/S%26P_SmallCap_600" class="mw-redirect" title="S&amp;P SmallCap 600">S&amp;P SmallCap 600</a> (S&amp;P 600) <a href="/wiki/Stock_market_index" title="Stock market index">stock market index</a>, maintained by <a href="/wiki/S%26P_Dow_Jones_Indices" title="S&amp;P Dow Jones Indices">S&amp;P Dow Jones Indices</a>, comprises the common stocks of 600 <a href="/wiki/Market_capitalization" title="Market capitalization">small-cap</a>, mostly American, companies. Although called the "S&amp;P 600", the index contains 603 stocks because it includes two share classes of stock from three of its component companies.\n</p>\n<div class="mw-heading mw-heading2"><h2 id="S&amp;P_600_component_stocks"><span id="S.26P_600_component_stocks"></span>S&amp;P 600 component stocks</h2><span class="mw-editsection"><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">[</span><a href="/w/index.php?title=List_of_S%26P_600_companies&amp;action=edit&amp;section=1" title="Edit section: S&amp;P 600 component stocks"><span>edit</span></a><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">]</span></span></div>\n<p>Stocks here are cross referenced with the following index funds to compose the list:\n</p>\n<ul><li>Vanguard S&amp;P Small-Cap 600 ETF (<a href="/wiki/NYSE_Arca" title="NYSE Arca">NYSE&#160;Arca</a>:&#160;<a rel="nofollow" class="external text" href="https://www.nyse.com/quote/ARCX:VIOO">VIOO</a>)<sup id="cite&#95;ref-1" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-1"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>1<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup></li>\n<li>SPDR Portfolio S&amp;P 600 Small Cap ETF (<a href="/wiki/NYSE_Arca" title="NYSE Arca">NYSE&#160;Arca</a>:&#160;<a rel="nofollow" class="external text" href="https://www.nyse.com/quote/ARCX:SPSM">SPSM</a>)<sup id="cite&#95;ref-2" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-2"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>2<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup></li>\n<li>iShares Core S&amp;P Small-Cap ETF (<a href="/wiki/NYSE_Arca" title="NYSE Arca">NYSE&#160;Arca</a>:&#160;<a rel="nofollow" class="external text" href="https://www.nyse.com/quote/ARCX:IJR">IJR</a>)<sup id="cite&#95;ref-3" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-3"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>3<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup></li></ul>\n<p>These index funds may be rebalanced at different intervals resulting in a small difference in holdings.\n</p><p>The companies listed here are sorted alphabetically by ticker symbol by default.\n</p>\n<div class="noprint"><div role="navigation" href="https://www.nasdaq.com/market-activity/stocks/zws">ZWS</a>\n</td>\n<td>Zurn Elkay Water Solutions Corp.\n</td>\n<td>Industrials\n</td>\n<td>Industrial Machinery &amp; Supplies &amp; href="https://www.sec.gov/edgar/browse/?CIK=0001439288">view</a>\n</td>\n<td>0001439288\n</td></tr></tbody></table>\n<div class="mw-heading mw-heading2"><h2 id="Recent_and_announced_changes_to_the_list_of_S&amp;P_600_components"><span id="Recent_and_announced_changes_to_the_list_of_S.26P_600_components"></span>Recent and announced changes to the list of S&amp;P 600 components</h2><span class="mw-editsection"><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">[</span><a href="/w/index.php?title=List_of_S%26P_600_companies&amp;action=edit&amp;section=2" title="Edit section: Recent and announced changes to the list of S&amp;P 600 components"><span>edit</span></a><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">]</span></span></div>\n<p>Periodically, <a href="/wiki/S%26P_Dow_Jones_Indices" title="S&amp;P Dow Jones Indices">S&amp;P Dow Jones Indices</a> reflects the changes of the index in response to company takeover, or updates the index based on company <a href="/wiki/Market_capitalization" title="Market capitalization">market capitalization</a>. Changes to index composition are made on an as needed basis. There is no scheduled reconstitution. Rather, changes in response to corporate actions and market developments can be made at any time.<sup id="cite&#95;ref-4" class="reference"><a href="#cite_note-4"><span class="cite-bracket">&#91;</span>4<span class="cite-bracket">&#93;</span></a></sup>\n</p>\n<table class="wikitable sortable" id="changes">\n\n<tbody><tr>\n<th rowspan="2">Date\n</th>\n<th colspan="2">Added\n</th>\n<th colspan="2">Removed\n</th>\n<th rowspan="2">Reason\n</th></tr>\n<tr>\n<th>Ticker</th>\n<th>Security</th>\n<th>Ticker</th>\n<th>Security\n</th></tr>\n<tr>\n<td>March 23, 2026</td>\n<td>MTCH</td>\n<td><a href="/wiki/Match_Group" title="Match Group">Match Group</a></td>\n<td>SOLS</td>\n<td><a href="/wiki/Solstice_Advanced_Materials" title="Solstice Advanced Materials">Solstice Advanced Materials</a></td>\n<td>MTCH was moved from the <a href="/wiki/S%26P_500" title="S&amp;P 500">S&amp;P 500</a> as it was more representative of the small cap market space.
